pi_items.source: project.json lists SRS.json, and setup_task.sh explicitly checks and opens the SRS document.
Directly verified by parsing SRS.json which contains requirement ID 245 with the text 'The application shall allow users to export requirements to an Enterprise Architect model.'
project.json lists NEEDS.json, which contains the target requirement.
Directly verified by parsing NEEDS.json which contains requirement ID 82 with the heading 'Export to Enterprise Architect'.
project.json defines a 'satisfaction' traceability link ('Satisfies'). This matches the verifier which checks if a link to NEEDS-82 was created.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic ReqView Example Project. The objective is to create a 'satisfaction' traceability link from requirement SRS-245 (in the SRS document) to requirement NEEDS-82 (in the NEEDS document). Inspection of the underlying data confirms that SRS-245 ('The application shall allow users to export requirements to an Enterprise Architect model.') and NEEDS-82 ('Export to Enterprise Architect') both exist in their respective documents. The 'satisfaction' link type is defined in the project's configuration.
